title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Culling Game Convergence
description: Late Culling Game Loredeck for Sakurajima, Angel and Hana, military incursion, Kenjaku versus Tengen's defenders, Sukuna's Megumi turn, Tsumiki and Yorozu, Gojo unsealing, and Shinjuku setup.
author: Saga

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen late Culling Game convergence through Gojo unsealing and Shinjuku setup.
continuity.notes: Shinjuku Showdown battle events, final Sukuna resolution, epilogue, post-series, anime-only changes, guidebook-only material, and Modulo should remain separate decks unless explicitly loaded.

dependencies.reason: Uses core Jujutsu Kaisen cursed energy, jujutsu society, Sukuna vessel, technique, and spoiler-gate assumptions.

license.name: Draft fan reference data
license.notes: For local testing. Requires human canon review before reference release.

health.notes: Expanded phase-1 draft-reference package; generated cards require human canon review before reference release.
